text:
## Team Context

**Your assigned name**: spec-developer-infra-sync
**Team Lead**: team-lead (use SendMessage to reach it)

**Communication Protocol** (you have SendMessage in your tools):
- `QUESTION: ...` — before starting, if requirements have genuine ambiguity
- `BLOCKER: ...` — immediately if you cannot proceed
- `DONE: {summary}` — when your deliverables are complete
- `SUGGESTION: ...` — proactively flag tech issues, arch concerns, refactoring ideas

**Context Strategy**: repomix
All relevant context is pre-loaded. Use Read/Glob/Grep for additional files.

**Escalation rule**: Do NOT work silently on ambiguity. Ask first.
**Team culture**: Your domain expertise is valued. Speak up.

## Tasks (5 tasks, do them all sequentially)

### Task 1: notesaner-swj — Configure Husky + Commitlint for Git Hooks
Set up pre-commit hooks and commit message linting.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Husky installed and initialized
- pre-commit hook runs lint-staged (lint + format changed files)
- commit-msg hook validates conventional commit format
- commitlint.config.js with conventional commits rules (module.exports, NOT ESM export)
- commitlint config: body-max-line-length 100

### Task 2: notesaner-b1sg — Yjs Document Conflict Resolution Strategy
Handle conflicting edits when reconnecting after offline period.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- CRDT guarantees no data loss (Yjs)
- Server canonical state from DB applied as base
- Client offline changes merged via Yjs CRDT algorithm
- No manual conflict resolution required for text
- For metadata (frontmatter): last-write-wins per field
- Conflict log: record merge events for audit
- Test: simulate two clients editing offline, reconnect, verify merge

### Task 3: notesaner-qgs — Unlinked Mentions Detection
Find occurrences of the current note title in other notes that are not already linked.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Server-side: FTS search for note title exact match minus existing links
- UI: Unlinked Mentions section below backlinks
- One-click to create link from mention
- Shows context around unlinked mention
- Configurable: enable/disable per workspace
- Background job indexes mentions on note save

### Task 4: notesaner-q2e — Local Graph View (Current Note Neighborhood)
Mini graph showing only the current note and its direct connections.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Displayed in right sidebar panel or as floating view
- Shows: current note (center), outgoing links, incoming links, and 2nd degree connections
- Node click navigates to note
- Depth slider: 1-3 hops
- Auto-updates when current note changes
- Miniature version of full graph but filtered

### Task 5: notesaner-hn7 — Admin Panel API for Auth Provider Management
Admin API endpoints for managing authentication providers.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GET /admin/auth-providers endpoint lists all configured providers
- POST /admin/auth-providers endpoint creates new SAML/OIDC provider
- PUT /admin/auth-providers/:id endpoint updates provider config
- DELETE /admin/auth-providers/:id endpoint removes provider
- PATCH /admin/auth-providers/:id/toggle enables/disables provider
- Admin-only access (isSuperAdmin or OWNER role)
- Config validation for SAML (cert, SSO URL, entity ID) and OIDC (issuer, clientId)

## Project Info
- NestJS 11, Prisma 6, PostgreSQL 17
- Project root: /Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner
- Sync engine: libs/sync-engine/src/
- Graph plugin: packages/plugin-graph/src/
- Auth admin: apps/server/src/modules/auth/admin-auth-providers.controller.ts (already started)
- Notes module: apps/server/src/modules/notes/
- Search module: apps/server/src/modules/search/
- Right sidebar panels: apps/web/src/features/workspace/panels/

## Key Architecture Decisions
- Husky 9+, commitlint config-conventional (module.exports syntax, NOT ESM)
- Yjs handles text merge via CRDT -- focus on metadata conflict resolution
- Search FTS already works via SearchService -- use it for unlinked mentions
- Graph plugin: D3-force already implemented in packages/plugin-graph -- local graph is subset
- AdminAuthProvidersController may already exist -- check and extend

Write unit tests for all backend changes.
summary: Husky/Commitlint + Yjs conflict resolution + unlinked mentions + local graph + admin auth providers
